introSection: Achterbahn is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Ticiland in Stein am Rhein, Schaffhausen, Switzerland. It opened with the park on 10 October 2020.
fullText: Achterbahn is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Ticiland in Stein am Rhein, Schaffhausen, Switzerland. It opened with the park on 10 October 2020.
